accountName.description: Primary account name displayed as the card heading.

accountNameValidationInfo.description: Validation state for `accountName`; shows required-field indicator when `valid` is false and the field is dirty or touched.

alternativeName.description: Secondary (alternative) name shown below the primary account name.

city.description: City label displayed in the card's geographic info row alongside `country`.

country.description: Country label displayed in the card's geographic info row.

dialogTitle.description: Title shown in the photo/record picker dialog when the user taps the photo area.

photo.description: Photo image data bound from the record's photo attribute.

photoTitle.description: Alt text / aria label for the profile photo image.

readonly.description: When `true`, disables photo upload and any editable fields; the card is shown in read-only mode. Bindable via `$Attribute | crt.ToBoolean`.

referenceColumn.description: Primary key column name used to load the record the card represents (e.g. `"$Id"`).

timeZone.description: Time-zone label shown in the card footer.

imageClear.description: Fires when the user clears the existing photo.

imageSelected.description: Fires when the user selects a new photo; payload is an `UploadImageData` object.

components.description: Mobile design-time host for `crt.AccountCompactProfile`. Renders an account compact profile card showing the account name, photo, alternative name, city/country geographic row, and time zone. Used in mobile account record pages for the primary identity section.

Mobile design-time host for the `crt.BarcodeScanner` view element. Renders a barcode and QR-code scanner field on a mobile page. When the user points the device camera at a code, a `scanned` action fires and the decoded text can be written to a page attribute. **Mobile-only** — this component is not available in web (desktop) page schemas. Key inputs: `size`, `enabled`, `features` (`{ flashToggle, beepOnScan }`), `scanTimeout`. Key output: `scanned`.

allowMenuOnDisabled.description: Allows menu to be opened if button is disabled.

caption.description: Button label (the visible text on the button). Use `#ResourceString(<key>)#` for localized text.

clickMode.description: Defines which mode button will work in

color.description: Button visual style (color theme). "primary" = blue filled button (brand action, e.g. Save or Submit); "accent" = green filled button (positive/focus action — shown as "Focus" in the designer); "warn" = red filled button (destructive or error-state action — shown as "Warning" in the designer); "default" = transparent background with subtle text (shown as "Plain" in the designer); "outline" = light-gray background with a blue border (secondary/non-primary action); "plain-white" = transparent with white text, for buttons placed on dark or glassmorphic backgrounds; "outline-white" = semi-transparent with a white border and white text, for glassmorphic themes.

disabled.description: When `true`, disables all click interactions. Bindable as `$Attribute | crt.ToBoolean` for runtime control.

hotkeys.description: Keyboard hotkeys that trigger the button click, using the shared CDK hotkey vocabulary.

icon.description: Button icon. Either an exact registered icon name — the `BUTTON_ICONS` set is the recommended curated list (e.g. `save-button-icon`, `edit-button-icon`), though any name registered in the platform icon registry also resolves; there are no short aliases, so `save` renders nothing (use `save-button-icon`) — or a `ButtonAnimatedIcon` Lottie config object for an animated glyph. Pair with `iconPosition` to control where it appears relative to the caption.

iconPosition.description: Icon placement relative to the caption. `only-icon` hides the caption; `only-text` hides the icon. Defaults to `'right-icon'`; set `'only-text'` for a caption-only button — the common choice for mobile action buttons.

iconSize.description: Icon size; extends the base set with mobile-specific `x2-large` and `x3-large` values.

menuItems.description: Dropdown menu items shown on click. With `clickMode: 'default'` the chevron opens the menu; with `clickMode: 'menu'` the whole button does.

size.description: Button size. `none`/`default` are coerced to `large` at runtime.

clicked.description: Action invoked when the user clicks the button. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }` to bind to a request handler; without `request` the click does nothing.

components.description: Tappable button for triggering actions, navigation, and menus on a mobile page.

allowUntoggle.description: When true clicking the currently pressed toggle deselects it (group can be empty). When false at least one toggle stays pressed.

badgeConfig.description: Badge style shared by every toggle's badge — color and offset of the small indicator dot/count. Individual badge values come from the items themselves.

contentAlign.description: Alignment of label and icon inside each toggle button. Defaults to `start`.

direction.description: Layout direction of the toggle row. `row` arranges horizontally (default); `column` stacks vertically.

disabled.description: Disables user interaction with every toggle in the group. Bindable as `$Attribute | crt.ToBoolean` for runtime control.

fitContent.description: When true the group hugs its content width; when false it fills the available width of the parent container.

gap.description: Spacing between toggle buttons. Accepts a `SizeEnum` token (`none`/`small`/`medium`/...) or a number of pixels.

iconSize.description: Icon size used inside each toggle button.

items.description: Collection of selectable items, each shaped like `{ value, displayValue, icon?, ... }`. For `crt.ButtonToggleGroup` with `for: '<TabPanelName>'`, the preprocessor populates this from the linked `crt.TabPanel` — do not bind manually in that case.

menuButtonsMode.description: When true each toggle behaves like a dropdown trigger (its `menuItems` open instead of toggling pressed state). Use for menu-styled toggle groups.

toggleViewMode.description: How the group renders. `button` (default) shows side-by-side toggles; `dropdown` collapses them into a single dropdown-style picker.

value.description: Currently pressed toggle (a `{ value, displayValue }` object). When the view config has `for: '<TabPanelName>'`, the preprocessor manages this and `items` from the linked `crt.TabPanel` — do not bind manually in that case.

valueChange.description: Action invoked when the selected item changes. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }`; payload is the new selected item.

components.description: Mobile design-time host for `crt.ButtonToggleGroup`. Renders a set of mutually-exclusive toggle buttons used for filter selection, view-mode switches, and segmented controls. Supports inline `items` (standalone mode) or a `for: '<TabPanelName>'` binding that auto-populates items from a sibling `crt.TabPanel`. Acts as a container: child `crt.ButtonToggleGroupItem` entries live in its `items` array.

displayMenuIcon.description: When true, shows the dropdown-menu chevron icon on the toggle button. Used together with `menuButtonsMode: true` to indicate that the toggle opens a menu.

components.description: Mobile design-time host for `crt.ButtonToggleGroupItem`. Represents an individual toggle button inside a `crt.ButtonToggleGroup`. Supports an optional icon, badge, and per-item disable state. The parent group manages the pressed/selected state — always insert inside a `crt.ButtonToggleGroup.items` array; standalone rendering is not supported.

pagingConfig.description: Paging config for drill down datagrid.

columnsChange.description: Fire event when datagrid columns are changed.

drillDown.description: Fire event when chart column clicked.

getProfileColumns.description: Fire event when profile columns are requested.

paginationChange.description: Fire event when datagrid drill down pagination change.

resetToDefault.description: Fire event when datagrid reset to default action called.

searchFilterChange.description: Fire event when analytics widget search filter is changed.

sortingChange.description: Fire event when datagrid sorting is changed.

components.description: Mobile design-time shell for the chart / graph widget (`crt.ChartWidget`). Renders data as bar, line, area, spline, scatter, doughnut, funnel, or horizontal-bar charts. Supports filtration via `PlatformAPIs.Filtration` and drilldown navigation. All supported chart types are registered in the Properties Panel toolbar.

ariaLabel.description: Screen reader label for the checkbox.

control.description: Form control that holds the field value. In schemas, bind with `"$<AttributeName>"` to link the input to a data source attribute.

disabled.description: When `true`, locks the checkbox from user interaction.

inversed.description: Invert the visual state — shows a checked appearance when the bound value is `false`.

label.description: Field label displayed above or beside the input. Use `#ResourceString(<key>)#` for localized text.

labelPosition.description: Label placement relative to the input. `auto` switches between `left` and `above` based on container width; `hidden` keeps the label for accessibility only.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text shown inside the empty input.

readonly.description: When true the checkbox is locked from user interaction and visually appears disabled. Bindable as `$Attribute | crt.ToBoolean` for runtime control.

tooltip.description: Tooltip text shown on hover next to the label.

value.description: Current boolean value or bound view-model attribute (e.g. `'$PDS_IsActive'`).

blurred.description: Action invoked when the input loses focus.

focused.description: Action invoked when the input gains focus.

keyDown.description: Action invoked on each `keydown` over the input. Same request-binding shape as `keyUp`; useful for capturing Enter/Escape before the value changes.

keyUp.description: Action invoked on each `keyup` over the input. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }`; payload is the `KeyboardEvent`.

valueChange.description: Action invoked when the checked state changes. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }` to bind a request handler; without `request` the change does not trigger custom logic (the bound `control` still updates).

components.description: Mobile design-time host for the `crt.Checkbox` view element. Renders a Boolean checkbox on a mobile page. For Boolean data-type fields in mobile pages prefer `crt.Toggle` — the mobile designer maps Boolean attributes to Toggle by default. Reserve `crt.Checkbox` for explicit tristate (`indeterminate`) or custom scenarios where a visual checkbox is intentional. Key inputs (inherited from `CrtBaseCheckboxComponent`): `control`, `label`, `labelPosition`, `readonly`, `visible`, `inversed`, `indeterminate`.

ariaLabel.description: Screen reader label for the field. Falls back to the visible label when empty.

control.description: Form control that holds the field value. In schemas, bind with `"$<AttributeName>"` to link the input to a data source attribute.

controlActions.description: Inline action buttons rendered inside the combobox input (typically icons like "go to source"). Each item is a `CrtMenuItemViewElementConfig` with a `code`/`icon`/`clicked` request binding.

label.description: Field label displayed above or beside the input. Use `#ResourceString(<key>)#` for localized text.

labelPosition.description: Label placement relative to the input. `auto` switches between `left` and `above` based on container width; `hidden` keeps the label for accessibility only.

listActions.description: Action items appended to the bottom of the dropdown list (e.g. "Add new record"). Each item is a `CrtMenuItemViewElementConfig`; built-in codes like `crt.AddRecordAction` resolve to standard handlers.

mode.description: Lookup mode (List or Selection Window). List by default.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text shown inside the empty input.

readonly.description: When true the combobox is locked from user interaction. Bindable as `$Attribute | crt.ToBoolean` for runtime control.

showSecondaryDisplayValue.description: When true the dropdown list shows a second line of text per item (e.g. an email or code beneath the primary display value). The runtime `crt-combobox-model` typically wires this via `secondaryDisplayValueConfig.show`.

showValueAsLink.description: When true the selected value renders as a clickable link (used in display contexts so the user can navigate to the source record).

sortFilteringFn.description: Function for sorting items when filtering.

tooltip.description: Tooltip text shown on hover next to the label.

useStaticFiltering.description: Sets state of using static filtering.

valueDetails.description: Extra detail text shown beneath the selected value (e.g. a description column from the lookup record). Typically bound as `$Attribute_ValueDetails` to a related attribute.

blurred.description: Action invoked when the input loses focus.

closed.description: Action invoked when the dropdown closes.

focused.description: Action invoked when the input gains focus.

keyDown.description: Action invoked on each `keydown` over the input. Same request-binding shape as `keyUp`; useful for capturing Enter/Escape before the value changes.

keyUp.description: Action invoked on each `keyup` over the input. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }`; payload is the `KeyboardEvent`.

opened.description: Action invoked when the dropdown opens.

paginationChange.description: Action invoked when the user scrolls to the bottom of the dropdown — used to fetch the next page. Same request-binding shape as `showList`; payload includes the current `filterValue`.

selectionWindowIconPressed.description: Action invoked when the user clicks the lookup (magnifier) icon — typically opens a selection window when `mode: 'SelectionWindow'`.

showList.description: Action invoked when the dropdown needs items loaded (e.g. opening with a filter). Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }`; payload includes `filterValue`. Used to populate the list from a remote source.

valueChange.description: Action invoked when the selected value changes. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }`; payload is the new `LookupValue`. The bound `control` updates automatically regardless.

components.description: Mobile design-time host for the `crt.ComboBox` view element. Renders a lookup dropdown selector on a mobile page. Use for Lookup and enumeration data-type fields. The dropdown presents a searchable list of options fetched from the bound data source. Key inputs (inherited from `CrtComboBoxComponent`): `control`, `label`, `labelPosition`, `readonly`, `visible`, `isAddAllowed`, `showValueAsLink`.

columnsCount.description: Number of side-by-side columns the entries are laid out in; coerced to 1 when zero or falsy.

defaultOptionConfig.description: Default values applied to a newly added entry (e.g. its communication type).

displayFormatColumnName.description: Row view-model attribute name holding the type's display format (the `CommunicationType.DisplayFormat` forward reference), used to pick the editor template per entry.

items.description: The communication entries to display, bound to a collection view-model attribute (prefix with `$`). The bound attribute must be declared with `isCollection: true` over a `crt.EntityDataSource`; a non-collection value crashes rendering with `TypeError: t.map is not a function`.

labelPosition.description: Placement of each entry's type label relative to its value field.

masterRecordColumnName.description: Foreign-key column on the communication entity that points back to the owner record — `"Contact"` for `ContactCommunication`, `"Account"` for `AccountCommunication`.

masterRecordColumnValue.description: Binding to the owner record's primary key (typically `"$Id"`); paired with `masterRecordColumnName`, it scopes the list to the current contact/account and stamps the foreign key on new entries.

numberColumnName.description: Row view-model attribute name holding the entry's value — the phone number, email, or social handle (the `<DataSource>_<Column>` attribute over the `Number` column), not the bare column name.

optionActions.description: Extra per-entry actions appended to each row's overflow menu.

primaryColumnName.description: Row view-model attribute name holding each entry's primary key (the `<DataSource>_Id` attribute).

readonly.description: When true, the whole panel is read-only: entries are shown but cannot be added, edited, or removed.

showNoDataPlaceholder.description: When true, shows a placeholder image while the list is empty; turn off on compact sidebar layouts.

templates.description: Per-type editor templates used to render and inline-edit each row's value. Keyed by the row's communication-option display-format type — the `CommunicationOptionTypeEnum` value read through `displayFormatColumnName` (e.g. `Phone`, `Email`, `Text`) — with a fallback to the `Text` template. Normally left at the component default.

typeColumnName.description: Row view-model attribute name holding the communication type (the `CommunicationType` lookup) — the `<DataSource>_<Column>` attribute key, not the bare entity column name.

components.description: Mobile design-time shell for the communication options widget (`crt.CommunicationOptions`). Renders a list of clickable communication links (call, email, SMS) for the record's communication-options data source. At design time the component auto-creates the backing data source and view-model attributes so the page schema stays valid without manual wiring.

birthDate.description: Contact birth date value; drives the age display below the name.

city.description: Contact city value displayed in the profile info row.

country.description: Contact country lookup value displayed in the profile info row.

dialogTitle.description: Title shown in the photo/record picker dialog when the user taps the photo area.

displayName.description: Full display name string; when set, name parts (first/middle/last) are derived from it via the locale template.

firstName.description: Contact first name; setting it recomputes `fullName` and emits `firstNameChange` if changed by the user.

firstNameValidationInfo.description: Platform-managed validation state for the first-name field; drives the required-field indicator.

lastName.description: Contact last name; setting it recomputes `fullName` and emits `lastNameChange` if changed by the user.

middleName.description: Contact middle name; setting it recomputes `fullName` and emits `middleNameChange` if changed by the user.

photo.description: Photo image data bound from the record's photo attribute.

photoTitle.description: Alt text / aria label for the profile photo image.

readonly.description: When `true`, disables photo upload and any editable fields; the card is shown in read-only mode. Bindable via `$Attribute | crt.ToBoolean`.

referenceColumn.description: Primary key column name used to load the record the card represents (e.g. `"$Id"`).

timeZone.description: Contact time-zone value displayed in the profile info row.

firstNameChange.description: Fires when the first-name field is edited; value is the new first-name string.

fullNameChange.description: Fires (debounced 100 ms) when the assembled full name changes; value is the formatted full-name string.

imageClear.description: Fires when the user clears the existing photo.

imageSelected.description: Fires when the user selects a new photo; payload is an `UploadImageData` object.

lastNameChange.description: Fires when the last-name field is edited; value is the new last-name string.

middleNameChange.description: Fires when the middle-name field is edited; value is the new middle-name string.

components.description: Mobile design-time host for `crt.ContactCompactProfile`. Renders a contact compact profile card showing the contact name (first/middle/last), photo, birth date, location (city/country), and time zone. Used in mobile contact record pages for the primary identity section.

ariaLabel.description: Screen reader label for the field. Falls back to the visible label when empty.

control.description: Form control that holds the field value. In schemas, bind with `"$<AttributeName>"` to link the input to a data source attribute.

disabled.description: Disables user interaction with the input. Bindable as `$Attribute | crt.ToBoolean` for runtime control.

label.description: Field label displayed above or beside the input. Use `#ResourceString(<key>)#` for localized text.

labelPosition.description: Label placement relative to the input. `auto` switches between `left` and `above` based on container width; `hidden` keeps the label for accessibility only.

mode.description: Possible the view that the calendar should be in.

multiYearSelector.description: State of active multiyear view when click on year.

pickerType.description: Possible picker types for crt-picker component.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text shown inside the empty input.

preventSameDateTimeSelection.description: Prevent user to select same date time.

readonly.description: When true the date/time picker is locked from user interaction. Bindable as `$Attribute | crt.ToBoolean` for runtime control.

startView.description: Possible the view that the calendar should start in.

timeSelectionInterval.description: Time selection interval used by list-based picker view.

tooltip.description: Tooltip text shown on hover next to the label.

useTwelveHourFormat.description: Sets state of using twelve-hour format.

blurred.description: Action invoked when the input loses focus.

focused.description: Action invoked when the input gains focus.

keyDown.description: Action invoked on each `keydown` over the input. Same request-binding shape as `keyUp`; useful for capturing Enter/Escape before the value changes.

keyUp.description: Action invoked on each `keyup` over the input. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }`; payload is the `KeyboardEvent`.

components.description: Mobile design-time host for the `crt.DateTimePicker` view element. Renders a date and/or time picker on a mobile page. Supports Date, Time, and DateTime data-value types. The display mode is controlled by the `pickerType` input (`'date'` | `'time'` | `'datetime'`). Key inputs (inherited from `CrtDateTimePickerComponent`): `control`, `label`, `pickerType`, `labelPosition`, `readonly`, `visible`, `placeholder`.

ariaLabel.description: Screen reader label for the field. Falls back to the visible label when empty.

control.description: Form control that holds the field value. In schemas, bind with `"$<AttributeName>"` to link the input to a data source attribute.

disabled.description: Disables user interaction with the input. Bindable as `$Attribute | crt.ToBoolean` for runtime control.

isFormatValidated.description: Email format validation toggle. When `true`, attaches a regex validator that rejects malformed addresses; when `false`, any string is accepted.

label.description: Field label displayed above or beside the input. Use `#ResourceString(<key>)#` for localized text.

labelPosition.description: Label placement relative to the input. `auto` switches between `left` and `above` based on container width; `hidden` keeps the label for accessibility only.

multiline.description: Whether the input renders as a multi-line textarea. Disabled for email/url data types via the data source attribute.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text shown inside the empty input.

readonly.description: Editability toggle. When `true`, the field renders as non-editable; pair with `disabled` to also dim the styling.

tooltip.description: Tooltip text shown on hover next to the label.

value.description: Current input value. Setting this updates the bound `control`; prefer binding `control` via the data source attribute and read this for one-way reads.

blurred.description: Action invoked when the input loses focus.

focused.description: Action invoked when the input gains focus.

keyDown.description: Action invoked on each `keydown` over the input. Same request-binding shape as `keyUp`; useful for capturing Enter/Escape before the value changes.

keyUp.description: Action invoked on each `keyup` over the input. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }`; payload is the `KeyboardEvent`.

components.description: Email-type text input with format validation for mobile pages.

Mobile design-time shell for the entity stage progress bar (`crt.EntityStageProgressBar`). Displays a horizontal stage pipeline for DCM-based status tracking (e.g. Lead stage, Case stage). At design time the component auto-populates `entityName` from the page's primary data source when it has not yet been explicitly configured.

expanded.description: Initial expanded state. `true` opens the panel on render; the user can still collapse it (see `expandedChange`).

fitContent.description: Layout toggle that shrinks the container to fit its children. When `false`, the container reserves its full grid-cell area.

fullWidthHeader.description: Layout toggle for the header. When `true` the title bar stretches the full panel width; when `false` it shrinks to `titleWidth` characters and tools fill the remaining space.

items.description: Child view elements rendered inside this container.

labelColor.description: Header label color. Accepts CSS color values (hex, rgb, named).

padding.description: Container padding. Accepts a single size keyword (`none`/`xs`/`s`/`m`/`l`/`xl`/`xxl`/`small`/`medium`/`large`) or a per-side object `{ top, bottom, left, right }`.

stretch.description: Layout toggle that lets the container fill the available width/height of its parent grid cell. When `false`, the container keeps its intrinsic size.

title.description: Panel header label. Use `#ResourceString(<key>)#` for localized text.

titleWidth.description: Header title width in characters when `fullWidthHeader` is `false`. Ignored when `fullWidthHeader` is `true`.

togglePosition.description: Placement of the expand/collapse toggle relative to the header label. `before` puts the chevron to the left of the title; `after` to the right.

toggleType.description: Visual style of the expand/collapse toggle. `default` shows the legacy chevron; `material` shows the Material outlined arrow.

tools.description: Buttons and other action controls rendered in the panel header alongside the title.

closed.description: Action invoked when the panel transitions from expanded to collapsed. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }`.

expandedChange.description: Action invoked whenever the expanded state changes, carrying the new boolean value as payload. Use this to mirror state into a view attribute via two-way `expanded` binding.

opened.description: Action invoked when the panel transitions from collapsed to expanded. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }` to react to expansion (e.g. lazy-load child content).

components.description: Mobile design-time canvas component for `crt.ExpansionPanel`. Renders a collapsible panel on a mobile page. The panel header shows a `title` and optional `tools` action controls; the body (`items`) is revealed or hidden when the user taps the toggle.
Mobile design-time component for `crt.Feed`. Renders an activity/message feed panel on a mobile page, displaying ESN (Enterprise Social Network) messages linked to a record.
Mobile design-time component for `crt.FileList`. Renders a file attachment list on a mobile page, allowing users to view and manage file attachments linked to a record.

direction.description: Flex direction. `'row'` lays items horizontally; `'column'` lays them vertically. On a mobile page the canonical container default is `'column'`; the `'row'` reported as this field's default is the shared web-container initializer.

gap.description: Gap between child items. Accepts a size token or a number (px).

items.description: Child view elements arranged in the flex layout.

wrap.description: Flex wrapping behavior when children exceed the container width. On a mobile page the canonical default is `'nowrap'`; the `'wrap'` reported as this field's default is the shared web-container initializer.

components.description: Design-time canvas component for `crt.FlexContainer`. Renders a flexbox layout container on the page canvas, supporting horizontal and vertical arrangement of child elements with configurable direction, alignment, gap, and wrapping. Shared between Freedom UI desktop and mobile page designers.
Single floating action button attached to crt.Scaffold.floatAction. Mobile-specific.

menuItems.description: Child crt.MenuItem entries for the dropdown menu.

menuTitle.description: Title shown on the menu picker.

iconPosition.description: Icon placement relative to the caption.

components.description: Mobile design-time shell for the folder-tree action toolbar (`crt.FolderTreeActions`). Renders a toggle button that opens or closes the paired `crt.FolderTree` panel and shows the active folder name when a folder is selected. Typically placed in a header container next to a `crt.FolderTree` element.

itemConfig.description: Per-item template/binding config (`templateValuesMapping` for caption/description/image column names, `referenceSchema`, `defaultSize`). Most schemas leave it empty and rely on framework defaults.

items.description: Source records to render. Bind via `"$<Attr>"` to a collection attribute (e.g., the data source's `Items` exposed attribute).

components.description: Mobile design-time component for `crt.Gallery`. Renders a card gallery with image thumbnails on a mobile page, supporting configurable item layouts and navigation to a specific record page on tap.

adaptive.description: Per-breakpoint column overrides for responsive layouts. Keys: `small` (phone portrait), `medium` (landscape / tablet portrait), `large` (tablet landscape). When set, `columns` acts as the default and each breakpoint entry can override it independently.

columns.description: CSS grid-template-columns value. Single string (e.g. `'1fr'`) or an array of column-size strings (e.g. `['1fr', '1fr']`). The mobile default is `'minmax(32px, 1fr)'` — a single responsive column that never collapses below 32px; use `'1fr'` for a plain single column.

gap.description: Row and column gap between grid cells. Accepts a pixel number, a size token, or a `ContainerGapConfig` object with separate `row` and `column` values.

rows.description: CSS grid-template-rows value. Single string (e.g. `'auto'`) or an array of row-size strings.

components.description: Mobile design-time canvas component for `crt.GridContainer`. Renders a CSS-grid layout container on the mobile page canvas and supports per-breakpoint column overrides via the `adaptive` property.

columns.description:
Grid column template definition for this breakpoint.
Can be an array of column sizes or a template string.

alt.description: Accessibility `alt` text for the rendered image.

ariaLabel.description: Screen reader label for the field. Falls back to the visible label when empty.

borderRadius.description: Corner rounding. Accepts a `SizeEnum` token (`small`/`medium`/`large`/`extra-large`), a number (px), or any CSS length string (e.g., `'50%'` for a circle).

colorId.description: Seed used by `placeholderMode: 'abbreviation'` to pick a stable background color. Bind to a record id to keep the color consistent per contact/account.

control.description: Form control that holds the field value. In schemas, bind with `"$<AttributeName>"` to link the input to a data source attribute.

disabled.description: Disables user interaction with the input. Bindable as `$Attribute | crt.ToBoolean` for runtime control.

label.description: Field label displayed above or beside the input. Use `#ResourceString(<key>)#` for localized text.

labelPosition.description: Label placement relative to the input. `auto` switches between `left` and `above` based on container width; `hidden` keeps the label for accessibility only.

maxFileSize.description: Maximum upload size in bytes. Forwarded as `maxFileSize` on the `imageSelected` payload; the system setting `MaxImageSize` is shown as a placeholder default.

multiline.description: Whether the input renders as a multi-line textarea. Disabled for email/url data types via the data source attribute.

placeholder.description: Icon name or abbreviation seed shown when no image is loaded. For `'abbreviation'` `placeholderMode`, seeds initials and background color; for `'icon'` mode, names the icon to display.

placeholderMode.description: Placeholder style when no image is set. `abbreviation` shows initials from `placeholder` over a contact-style color; `icon` shows the icon named by `placeholder`.

positioning.description: Image fit inside the frame (CSS `object-fit`). `cover` crops to fill; `scale-down` shrinks to fit without cropping.

readonly.description: Editability toggle. When `true`, the field renders as non-editable; pair with `disabled` to also dim the styling.

size.description: Image frame size preset. Ignored when both `customWidth` and `customHeight` are set.

tooltip.description: Tooltip text shown on hover next to the label.

value.description: Bound view-model attribute (e.g. `'$PDS_Photo'`) or empty string for unbound. Prefer this property over `control` for image fields.

blurred.description: Action invoked when the input loses focus.

focused.description: Action invoked when the input gains focus.

imageClear.description: Action invoked when the user clears the current image. Bind to a request that clears the stored value.

imageSelected.description: Action invoked when the user picks a file. Payload: `{ file, maxFileSize }`. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }` to upload the file via a handler.

keyDown.description: Action invoked on each `keydown` over the input. Same request-binding shape as `keyUp`; useful for capturing Enter/Escape before the value changes.

keyUp.description: Action invoked on each `keyup` over the input. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }`; payload is the `KeyboardEvent`.

components.description: Mobile design-time host for the `crt.ImageInput` view element. Renders an image upload and preview field on a mobile page. Lets users pick an image from the device gallery or camera, displays a preview inside a configurable frame, and emits upload/clear actions. Key inputs (inherited from `CrtBaseImageInputComponent`): `control`, `label`, `size`, `borderRadius`, `positioning`, `alt`, `placeholderMode`, `maxFileSize`.

config.description: Full indicator widget configuration object. Shape: `{ title, data: { providing, formatting }, text: { template, metricMacros, fontSizeMode, labelPosition }, layout: { color, border, icon }, theme, hideTitle }`.

pagingConfig.description: Paging config for drill down datagrid.

columnsChange.description: Fire event when datagrid columns are changed.

drillDown.description: Fire event when chart column clicked.

getProfileColumns.description: Fire event when profile columns are requested.

paginationChange.description: Fire event when datagrid drill down pagination change.

resetToDefault.description: Fire event when datagrid reset to default action called.

searchFilterChange.description: Fire event when analytics widget search filter is changed.

sortingChange.description: Fire event when datagrid sorting is changed.

components.description: Mobile design-time shell for the indicator (KPI metric) widget (`crt.IndicatorWidget`). Shows a single aggregated metric — count, sum, average, min, or max — with a configurable title, color theme, and label position. Supports filtration via `PlatformAPIs.Filtration`. On mobile the icon name is prefixed with the mobile-button icon namespace.

comparisonProviding.description:
Optional comparison data providing configuration.
When provided along with comparison display config, enables comparison mode.

ariaLabel.description: Screen reader label for the field. Falls back to the visible label when empty.

control.description: Form control that holds the field value. In schemas, bind with `"$<AttributeName>"` to link the input to a data source attribute.

disabled.description: Disables user interaction with the input. Bindable as `$Attribute | crt.ToBoolean` for runtime control.

label.description: Field label displayed above or beside the input. Use `#ResourceString(<key>)#` for localized text.

labelPosition.description: Label placement relative to the input. `auto` switches between `left` and `above` based on container width; `hidden` keeps the label for accessibility only.

multiline.description: Whether the input renders as a multi-line textarea. Disabled for email/url data types via the data source attribute.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text shown inside the empty input.

readonly.description: Editability toggle. When `true`, the field renders as non-editable; pair with `disabled` to also dim the styling.

tooltip.description: Tooltip text shown on hover next to the label.

value.description: Current input value. Setting this updates the bound `control`; prefer binding `control` via the data source attribute and read this for one-way reads.

blurred.description: Action invoked when the input loses focus.

focused.description: Action invoked when the input gains focus.

keyDown.description: Action invoked on each `keydown` over the input. Same request-binding shape as `keyUp`; useful for capturing Enter/Escape before the value changes.

keyUp.description: Action invoked on each `keyup` over the input. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }`; payload is the `KeyboardEvent`.

components.description: Single-line text input field for mobile pages.

caption.description: Label text shown to the user. Use `#ResourceString(<key>)#` for localized values; numeric `0` is coerced to the string `"0"`, all other falsy values render as empty.

labelColor.description: Font color. Accepts a CSS color or a Creatio theme color token (e.g. `"auto"`, `"primary-color-1"`).

labelEllipsis.description: When `true`, clips overflowing text with an ellipsis rather than wrapping to a new line.

labelThickness.description: Font weight applied on top of `labelType`. `default` keeps the preset's intrinsic weight.

labelType.description: Typography preset. Sets the label's font scale and weight family (headlines, body, caption, button, etc.).

components.description: Static text label for headings, captions, and inline explanatory copy. Controls typography preset (`labelType`), weight (`labelThickness`), and color (`labelColor`).
Mobile design-time component for `crt.List`. Renders a scrollable record list on a mobile page. Used in list/section pages to display a collection of records with configurable item layouts.

Item layout template inserted as a child of crt.List via propertyName 'itemLayout'. Defines the title, subtitle, body columns, and icon for each row in the list. Body items are objects with a 'value' binding (e.g. { "value": "$DataSource_ColumnName" }); they render as labeled fields automatically.

actions.description: Array of action button configs shown on the list item.

body.description: Array of body field objects. Each item: { "value": "$DataSource_Column" }. Maps to the 'Columns' section in the designer.

icon.description: Binding to an image column or null. Maps to the 'Image' setting in the designer.

showEmptyValues.description: Whether to display rows for body fields that have empty values.

subtitles.description: Array of subtitle descriptors. Each entry is a LabeledStateProperty object.

title.description: Binding to the primary display column, e.g. '$List1DS_Name'. Maps to the 'Title column' setting in the designer.

context.description: View model passed as context to menu items that conditionally show/disable based on row data.

items.description: Menu items as view element config.

menuItems.deprecationReason: Use property . Will be removed in https://creatio.atlassian.net/browse/RND-21872

panelClass.description: CSS class(es) added to the dropdown panel element (space-delimited string).

stopOverlayClickPropagation.description: When `true`, clicks on the CDK overlay backdrop are stopped from propagating to the page. Use inside modals or overlays to prevent unintended close-on-outside-click behavior.

useGlassmorphism.description: Applies a blurred glass-effect style to the dropdown panel backdrop.

xPosition.description: Horizontal alignment of the dropdown panel relative to its trigger: `"before"` or `"after"`.

yPosition.description: Vertical placement of the dropdown panel relative to its trigger: `"above"` or `"below"`.

components.description: Dropdown/context menu container used for both desktop (Freedom UI) and mobile pages. Holds `crt.MenuItem` entries provided via the `items` input and can be triggered programmatically or embedded inside a `crt.Button` via `menuItems`. Supports nested sub-menus, glassmorphism backdrop, and configurable open position.

setPropertyValue.type: (name: string, value: unknown, silent: unknown) => void

_reloadDependentModels.type: (model: Model, modelAttributes: string[], reloadOnlyScope: DataSourceScope) => void

copy.type: (dataSourceName: string, recordId: string, copiedValues?: JsonObject) => Observable<JsonData>

delete.type: (dataSourceName: string, parameters: ModelParameterConfig[], options?: DeleteModelRequestHandlerConfig) => Observable<DataSourceSaveResult>

getDataSourceLoadParameters.type: (dataSourceName: string, modelLoadConfiguration?: Record<string, Record<string, unknown>>) => Promise<DataSourceLoadParameters>

loadLookupList.type: (bindContext: BindContext, parametersConfig: ModelParameterConfig[], payload?: Record<string, unknown>) => void

save.type: (dataSourceName: string, parameters: ModelParameterConfig[], options?: SaveModelRequestHandlerConfig) => Observable<DataSourceSaveResult>

set.type: (attributeName: string, value: unknown, options?: ViewModelAttributeChangeEventOptionsType) => Promise<void>

setValue.deprecationReason: This method will be refactored in RND-26204.

addNewAttribute.type: (viewModelAttributePath: string, attributeConfig: SimpleAttributeConfig, parentDataSourceName?: string) => void

loadLookupList.type: (lookupAttributePath: string, parameters: DataSourceParameters, options: DataSourceLoadOptions) => Observable<LookupListResponse>

filters.type:
( | BooleanComparisonFilter | MathComparisonFilter | StringComparisonFilter | DateComparisonFilter | RelativeDateComparisonFilter | LookupComparisonFilter | IsNullComparisonFilter | IsNotNullComparisonFilter | FilterGroup
	)[]

caption.description: Menu item label. Pass the resolved string; raw translate keys trigger a console warning and are auto-resolved.

disabled.description: Toggle that greys out the item and blocks clicks. Bindable to a model attribute via `$AttributeName`.

icon.description: Leading icon name shown next to the menu item label.

iconColor.description: Icon style. Palette tokens (`primary`/`accent`/`warn`/`default`) apply theme classes; any other string is treated as a custom CSS color.

items.description: Nested submenu items. Each entry is a `CrtMenuItemViewElementConfig` accepting the same properties as this component.

visible.description: Toggle that hides the menu item. Accepts a boolean, a model attribute reference (e.g. `"$canEdit"`), or a predicate function evaluated against the binding data.

clicked.description: Action invoked when the user clicks the menu item. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }` to bind to a request handler.

components.description: Mobile design-time host for `crt.MenuItem`. Renders a tappable row inside a `crt.Menu` with an optional leading icon and label. Supports nested sub-menus via the `items` input and fires a `clicked` output when tapped. Always place inside a `crt.Menu.items` array or a `crt.Button.menuItems` array.
Visual separator between menu items in a crt.Button or crt.FloatingActionButton dropdown menu.

ariaLabel.description: Screen reader label for the field. Falls back to the visible label when empty.

control.description: Form control that holds the field value. In schemas, bind with `"$<AttributeName>"` to link the input to a data source attribute.

disabled.description: Disables user interaction with the input. Bindable as `$Attribute | crt.ToBoolean` for runtime control.

format.description: Numeric display format. `decimalPrecision` controls how many fractional digits are rendered (e.g. `{ decimalPrecision: 2 }` → `"3.14"`).

label.description: Field label displayed above or beside the input. Use `#ResourceString(<key>)#` for localized text.

labelPosition.description: Label placement relative to the input. `auto` switches between `left` and `above` based on container width; `hidden` keeps the label for accessibility only.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text shown inside the empty input.

readonly.description: Editability toggle. When `true`, the field renders as non-editable; pair with `disabled` to also dim the styling.

tooltip.description: Tooltip text shown on hover next to the label.

value.description: Current input value. Setting this updates the bound `control`; prefer binding `control` via the data source attribute and read this for one-way reads.

blurred.description: Action invoked when the input loses focus.

focused.description: Action invoked when the input gains focus.

keyDown.description: Action invoked on each `keydown` over the input. Same request-binding shape as `keyUp`; useful for capturing Enter/Escape before the value changes.

keyUp.description: Action invoked on each `keyup` over the input. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }`; payload is the `KeyboardEvent`.

components.description: Numeric text input for mobile pages, with configurable decimal precision.

components.description: Phone number input with call intent support for mobile pages.

config.description: Quick filter configuration. Contains caption, icon, iconPosition, etc.

filterType.description: Type of quick filter (Custom, DateRange, Lookup). Determines which UI to render in the template.

components.description: Quick filter chip for applying a named data filter. Renders as a filter button/chip in the mobile page header area.
Group of quick filter chips. Mobile-specific container that holds one or more `crt.QuickFilter` entries in the mobile page header area.

ariaLabel.description: Screen reader label for the field. Falls back to the visible label when empty.

control.description: Form control that holds the field value. In schemas, bind with `"$<AttributeName>"` to link the input to a data source attribute.

disabled.description: Disables user interaction with the input. Bindable as `$Attribute | crt.ToBoolean` for runtime control.

label.description: Field label displayed above or beside the input. Use `#ResourceString(<key>)#` for localized text.

multiline.description: Whether the input renders as a multi-line textarea. Disabled for email/url data types via the data source attribute.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text shown inside the empty input.

readonly.description: Editability toggle. When `true`, the field renders as non-editable; pair with `disabled` to also dim the styling.

tooltip.description: Tooltip text shown on hover next to the label.

value.description: Current input value. Setting this updates the bound `control`; prefer binding `control` via the data source attribute and read this for one-way reads.

blurred.description: Action invoked when the input loses focus.

focused.description: Action invoked when the input gains focus.

keyDown.description: Action invoked on each `keydown` over the input. Same request-binding shape as `keyUp`; useful for capturing Enter/Escape before the value changes.

keyUp.description: Action invoked on each `keyup` over the input. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }`; payload is the `KeyboardEvent`.

components.description: Mobile design-time component for `crt.RichTextEditor`. Renders a multi-line rich text editor field on a mobile page, supporting formatted text input bound to a model attribute.

actions.description: Right-side navigation bar items — save and search action buttons go here.

items.description: Page body — array of container or component references rendered below the navigation bar.

leading.description: Left-side navigation bar items — back and cancel buttons go here.

title.description: Page title text shown in the navigation bar. Typically a `'$PageTitle'` attribute binding.

components.description: Mandatory root element for every mobile page. Provides the top navigation bar (title, leading, actions) and the page body (items). All other content goes inside it. Templates already insert one Scaffold — do NOT insert a second one; use merge to patch it.

control.description: Bound form control. In page schemas, bind with `'$<AttributeName>'` to link the slider to a data source attribute.

hideLabels.description: Indicates if slider labels are visible.

paddingLineMode.description: Defines if line in slider should have padding. Only available for disabled-hide-thumb modes.

readonly.description: When `true`, locks the slider from user interaction.

valueChanged.description: Event will notify when slider value changes.

components.description: Mobile design-time host for the `crt.Slider` view element. Renders a horizontal numeric range slider on a mobile page. The user drags a thumb between `minValue` and `maxValue`, snapping to `step` increments. The selected value is written back to the bound `control` attribute. Key inputs (inherited from `CrtBaseDesignerSliderComponent`): `control`, `minValue`, `maxValue`, `step`, `color`.

iconPosition.description: Icon placement relative to the caption.

components.description: Sort control for record lists. Mobile-specific button that opens a sort order picker and fires `valueChange` when the user selects a sort option.

fitContent.description: Layout toggle that shrinks the container to fit its children. When `false`, the container reserves its full grid-cell area.

items.description: Child view elements rendered inside this container.

padding.description: Container padding. Accepts a single size keyword (`none`/`xs`/`s`/`m`/`l`/`xl`/`xxl`/`small`/`medium`/`large`) or a per-side object `{ top, bottom, left, right }`.

stretch.description: Layout toggle that lets the container fill the available width/height of its parent grid cell. When `false`, the container keeps its intrinsic size.

tools.description: Tab-header tools slot: an array of child view elements rendered as action controls next to the tab caption (e.g. `crt.Button`, `crt.Icon`). Typically declared as nested `items` ops in `viewConfigDiff` with `propertyName: "tools"`.

components.description: Mobile design-time canvas component for `crt.TabContainer`. Represents an individual tab body inside a `crt.TabPanel`. The `caption` property sets the tab-header label; `items` holds the body content shown when the tab is active.

disableLink.description: When `true`, the email address is rendered as plain text without a clickable mailto link or icon button.

components.description: Internal email cell for data table rows. Used by data table to render email column values with mailto links. Not intended for direct insertion into mobile page schemas.

allowToggleClose.description: Toggle-mode only. When `true`, clicking the active toggle closes the body (no tab selected); when `false`, the active toggle stays selected.

bodyBackgroundColor.description: Background color of the tab body area (the panel below the headers). Accepts a `ThemeColor` token.

fitContent.description: When `true`, the panel sizes itself to its content; when `false`, it stretches to fill the parent container.

headerBackgroundColor.description: Background color of the tab header strip. Only effective when `styleType` is `partiallyColored` or `fullyColored`.

isToggleTabHeaderVisible.description: Toggle-mode only. When `false`, hides the toggle header row entirely (useful when an external `crt.ButtonToggleGroup` controls the selection via `for`).

items.description: Tabs displayed in the panel. Items are nested `crt.TabContainer` (when `mode: 'tab'`) or `crt.ToggleContainer` (when `mode: 'toggle'`) view configs.

mode.description: Layout style: `tab` renders a classic horizontal tab bar; `toggle` renders a button-toggle group that can be paired with `crt.ButtonToggleGroup` via `for`.

selectedTab.description: Currently selected tab as a `LookupValue` whose `value` matches a tab `name`; setting it activates that tab. Use to bind selection to a view-model attribute (e.g. for deep-linking).

selectedTabIndex.description: Zero-based index of the active tab; setting it programmatically activates that tab. Pair with `selectedTabIndexChange` to bind to a view-model attribute.

selectedTabTitleColor.description: Text color of the active tab title. `auto` defers to the theme default.

stretch.description: When `true`, the panel stretches to fill the parent container's height; when `false`, it sizes to its content. `null`/`undefined` falls back to `true`.

styleType.description: Tab panel visual style. `default` shows plain headers; `partiallyColored` colors the header strip; `fullyColored` colors header and body.

tabTitleColor.description: Text color of inactive tab titles. `auto` defers to the theme default.

underlineSelectedTabColor.description: Color of the underline indicator under the active tab. Only effective when `styleType` is not `fullyColored`; `auto` defers to the theme default.

selectedTabChange.description: Action invoked when the selected tab changes; emits a `LookupValue` `{ value, displayValue, primaryImageValue }` describing the new tab. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }`.

selectedTabIndexChange.description: Action invoked when the selected tab index changes; emits the new zero-based index. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }`.

components.description: Mobile design-time canvas component for `crt.TabPanel`. Renders the top-level tab-strip container on a mobile page, holding one or more `crt.TabContainer` children. Users switch between tabs by tapping the strip.

customFilters.description: Content slot for additional filter view elements rendered alongside the built-in quick filters (date, owner, entity).

filterValues.description: Extra filter groups applied per tile schema. Each `TileFilter` targets one entity (`type`) and adds its `filter` to that tile's `FilterGroup`.

isTileReadOnly.description: Read-only toggle that disables inline edits inside individual tiles (e.g. case/email head editors).

masterEntity.description: Alternative to `masterSchemaId`: a full `LookupValue` whose `value` is the master record id. Use to bind to a related-entity attribute instead of the page's own `$Id`.

masterEntitySchemaName.description: Entity schema name of the master record. Auto-derived from the page's primary data source when not set explicitly.

masterSchemaId.description: Record id of the master entity the timeline shows activity for. Typically bound to the page's primary record via `"$Id"`.

quickFilterByOwnerConfig.description: Quick-filter dropdown config for the "filter by owner" lookup chip. Synthesized at runtime by `TimelinePreprocessor` from a `Contact` entity schema; rarely overridden by hand.

tools.description: Content slot for action toolbar buttons rendered at the top of the timeline (e.g. add note, refresh).

components.description: Mobile design-time component for `crt.Timeline`. Renders a chronological timeline view for records on a mobile page, showing activities, calls, emails, feed messages, and files in time order.

data.description: Tile data configuration. Shape: `{ schemaType: string, columns: Array<{ path, caption, dataValueType }> }`. `schemaType` identifies the entity type (e.g. `'SysFile'`, `'Feed'`); `columns` lists the attribute columns to render inside the tile.

components.description: Individual tile for a `crt.Timeline` item. Managed by the parent `crt.Timeline` — do not insert directly; the timeline renders tiles automatically from its `items` configuration.

ariaLabel.description: Screen reader label for the field. Falls back to the visible label when empty.

control.description: Form control that holds the field value. In schemas, bind with `"$<AttributeName>"` to link the input to a data source attribute.

disabled.description: When `true`, locks the toggle from user interaction.

label.description: Field label displayed above or beside the input. Use `#ResourceString(<key>)#` for localized text.

labelPosition.description: Label placement relative to the input. `auto` switches between `left` and `above` based on container width; `hidden` keeps the label for accessibility only.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text shown inside the empty input.

tooltip.description: Tooltip text shown on hover next to the label.

blurred.description: Action invoked when the input loses focus.

focused.description: Action invoked when the input gains focus.

keyDown.description: Action invoked on each `keydown` over the input. Same request-binding shape as `keyUp`; useful for capturing Enter/Escape before the value changes.

keyUp.description: Action invoked on each `keyup` over the input. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }`; payload is the `KeyboardEvent`.

valueChange.description: Fires when the toggle state changes. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {} }` to handle the change.

components.description: Mobile design-time host for the `crt.Toggle` view element. Renders a Boolean on/off slide toggle on a mobile page. The mobile designer maps Boolean data-type fields to `crt.Toggle` by default — always prefer this component over `crt.Checkbox` for Boolean fields in mobile pages. Key inputs: `control` (Boolean bound attribute), `label`, `labelPosition`, `readonly`, `visible`.

ariaLabel.description: Screen reader label for the field. Falls back to the visible label when empty.

control.description: Form control that holds the field value. In schemas, bind with `"$<AttributeName>"` to link the input to a data source attribute.

disabled.description: Disables user interaction with the input. Bindable as `$Attribute | crt.ToBoolean` for runtime control.

icon.description: Web-link icon shown next to the input (e.g. `world-icon`, `linkedin-web-icon`, `youtube-web-icon`). Falls back to the default world icon when empty.

label.description: Field label displayed above or beside the input. Use `#ResourceString(<key>)#` for localized text.

labelPosition.description: Label placement relative to the input. `auto` switches between `left` and `above` based on container width; `hidden` keeps the label for accessibility only.

multiline.description: Whether the input renders as a multi-line textarea. Disabled for email/url data types via the data source attribute.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text shown inside the empty input.

readonly.description: Editability toggle. When `true`, the field renders as non-editable; pair with `disabled` to also dim the styling.

tooltip.description: Tooltip text shown on hover next to the label.

value.description: Current input value. Setting this updates the bound `control`; prefer binding `control` via the data source attribute and read this for one-way reads.

blurred.description: Action invoked when the input loses focus.

focused.description: Action invoked when the input gains focus.

keyDown.description: Action invoked on each `keydown` over the input. Same request-binding shape as `keyUp`; useful for capturing Enter/Escape before the value changes.

keyUp.description: Action invoked on each `keyup` over the input. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }`; payload is the `KeyboardEvent`.

components.description: URL/web address text input for mobile pages.

name.description: Schema-unique element code. The advanced settings input that identifies this element in the view config and is referenced by other elements (e.g. `crt.ButtonToggleGroup`'s `for`, `crt.TabPanel` activation).

type.description: Discriminator. Always equals the component's componentType. Emit values.type = componentType verbatim; ignore any per-component overrides.

aggregationValue.description: its string, because string | number is not supported in OpenApi

filters.type:
( | BooleanComparisonFilter | MathComparisonFilter | StringComparisonFilter | DateComparisonFilter | RelativeDateComparisonFilter | LookupComparisonFilter | IsNullComparisonFilter | IsNotNullComparisonFilter | FilterGroup
	)[]

FormControl.description: Angular reactive forms control. Used to bind an input component to a parent form model.

items.valueType: ɵBaseFilter | ɵBetweenFilter | ɵCompareFilter | ɵExistsFilter | IFilterGroup | ɵInFilter | ɵIsNullFilter | ɵSingleFilter

IMask.description: IMask input-masking library namespace. Members like `IMask.AnyMaskedOptions` describe the configuration object accepted by masked inputs.

JsonData.type: string | number | boolean | null | undefined | ɵJsonObject | ɵJsonArray

params.valueType: string | boolean | number | null | undefined | RequestParamsBindingConfig | RequestParamBindingConfigValue[] | LocalizableStringArray

RequestParamBindingConfigValue.type: string | boolean | number | null | undefined | RequestParamsBindingConfig | RequestParamBindingConfigValue[] | LocalizableStringArray
